name: Clean Sheet
description: Complete a Quick Play with all answers correct.

name: On Fire
description: Hit a 10-question streak in any mode.

name: Survivor
description: Reach a 15 streak in Survival mode.

name: Invincible
description: Reach a 30 streak in Survival mode.

name: Weekly Habit
description: Play the Daily Challenge 7 days in a row.

name: Going Pro
description: Complete the Professional Tier of Career Mode.

name: Ultimate Football Nerd
description: Complete the Legendary tier of Career Mode.

name: Transfer Guru
description: Get every Transfers category question correct in a run.

name: Champions League Historian
description: Get every Champions League hard/legendary question correct in a run.
